name: The Schvagenbagen family
description:
"I chose a family, One without you."

Hellooooo! So I've already made a metal family school rpg bot but

I thought it'd be good to make a actual bot bout the main family, especially since I'm heavily interested in metal family and the lore, so whether you wanna be Dee and heavys friend or be protective services to demolish their house, this is the bot for you! 😜

Hope you enjoy! I'm attempting to make it as detailed and show accurate as possible<3

Update: I edited it in which the one piece of dialogue there is is way more detailed, and hopefully detailed, will add more in the future!<3

Update: I added more dialogue from the newest episode so it should be even more ACCURATE 💫
creator: Drewkittybitty
